aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with clear service offerings and location information, but lacks depth in content and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and provide fresh content.
Expand service pages with more detailed information and relevant keywords.
Implement a blog to target long-tail keywords and establish authority in the plumbing niche.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile (GBP) is not fully utilized. While the business has a website, there is no evidence of an optimized GBP with reviews, posts, or regular updates.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which are crucial for local search visibility.
Lack of GBP posts and updates to engage with potential customers.
Incomplete business information or potential inconsistencies across platforms.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on its website, but lacks widespread citations across relevant directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local business associations.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media profiles.
Submit the business to local citation services to improve local search presence.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema beyond basic LocalBusiness schema.
Missing FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
No Review schema to highlight customer feedback and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of user-generated content and engagement features.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed service information or customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review system and adding schema markup for reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, keyword-rich content such as blog posts and detailed service pages to establish the business as an authority in the plumbing industry.

page_title: Plumber Sandy Springs GA | Saving Plumbing
